503.description: The Health Check is not successful

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status filtri (admin uchun). Public holatda default PUBLISHED. 'ALL' barchasini ko'rsatadi.

404.description: ICD kod topilmadi yoki feature disabled

409.description: Reference is in use by N blocks

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Admin uchun: status filtri. Public holatda har doim PUBLISHED

post.summary: Lifecycle scan manual trigger (12 oy lik stale bloklarni topadi)

get.summary: Joriy foydalanuvchining triage sessiyalari (bemor 'Mening kasalliklarim' uchun)

post.summary: Send triage result to a doctor via FHIR message

get.description: Returns paginated triage sessions assigned to a doctor. Default behaviour lists the caller's own inbox (doctorId=me, status=SENT_TO_DOCTOR). Requires DOCTOR / SPECIALIST / MEDICAL_EDITOR / ADMIN role.

parameters.name: doctorId
parameters.description: Doctor filter. Use "me" (default) to list sessions assigned to the authenticated user; a numeric user id requires ADMIN role.

get.summary: List triage sessions for a doctor inbox
Get a triage session by ID

post.summary: Save a personal note for the disease in this session

get.description: When `category` and/or `icd10` are passed, only rules whose scope matches (AND semantics, plus the GLOBAL rules) are returned. Unscoped calls return every active rule, useful for the admin UI.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Disease category (accepts Uzbek slug or English canonical name).

get.summary: List active red-flag rules (optionally scoped by disease).
Fetch a single red-flag rule by its stable key.

get.description: Returns the subset of tools the caller may see. Applies scope (category + icd10), toolType filter, and the soft audience gate. Inactive tools are hidden unless the caller is ADMIN/EDITOR and passes `includeInactive=true`.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Disease category (Uzbek slug or English canonical name).

parameters.name: clinicId
parameters.description: Clinic tenant id. When present, clinic-level overrides are applied to isActive. Ignored for non-authenticated calls.

parameters.name: includeInactive
parameters.description: ADMIN-only: include soft-deactivated tools. Silently ignored for non-admin callers.

get.summary: List active clinical tools (optionally scoped + role-gated).
Fetch a single tool by its stable key.
List ALL tools (including inactive) with admin metadata.

post.summary: Create a new tool. Restricted to medical editors + system admins.

get.summary: Fetch a single tool (admin view, includes audit).

patch.description: When `isActive=false`, a `deactivationReason` is required. Writes are audited via `updatedBy` / `deactivatedBy`.
patch.summary: Update mutable metadata. Flip isActive to enable/disable globally.

delete.summary: Soft-disable a tool (alias of PATCH with isActive=false).

put.description: Clinic admins may only override tools for their own clinicId. System admins may target any clinic.

diseaseId.description: Specific disease ID to match against. If omitted, scans all PUBLISHED diseases.

doctorNote.example: Qo'shimcha tekshiruvlar kerak: EKG, qon tahlili. Kasalxonaga yotqizish tavsiya qilinadi.

note.description: Optional note to attach to the message

kind.description: Discriminator — leaf condition or boolean composition.

toolKey.description: Stable slug matching the FE registry (e.g. "phq-9").

formulaKey.description: Whitelisted compute function identifier on the client (no arbitrary code).

outputSchema.description: Optional output schema (bands, thresholds, recommendation map). Shape depends on toolType.

showFormulaForAudience.description: Audience gate for formula-text visibility (ContentLevel string).

allowedAudiences.description: AudienceMode values allowed to SEE this tool in the UI.

requiredRoles.description: UserRole values allowed to actually RUN this tool (hard gate; 403 otherwise).

toolKey.description: Stable slug matching the FE registry (e.g. "phq-9").

formulaKey.description: Whitelisted compute function identifier on the client (no arbitrary code).

outputSchema.description: Optional output schema (bands, thresholds, recommendation map). Shape depends on toolType.

showFormulaForAudience.description: Audience gate for formula-text visibility (ContentLevel string).

allowedAudiences.description: AudienceMode values allowed to SEE this tool in the UI.

requiredRoles.description: UserRole values allowed to actually RUN this tool (hard gate; 403 otherwise).

clinicOverrides.description: Per-clinic override map. Shape: { "<clinicId>": { isActive: boolean, reason?: string, updatedAt: string } }.

formulaKey.description: Whitelisted compute function identifier. Unknown keys render as "unsupported" on the client.

inputs.description: Input schema (CalculatorInput[] or QuestionnaireItem[]). Shape validated at the runtime layer, not here.

deactivationReason.description: Required when flipping isActive=false so admins can audit who/why.

isActive.description: true = enable for this clinic, false = disable. Overrides the global `isActive` flag for this tenant only.

reason.description: Audit note — shown in the admin UI.
